name: Nicolásek
description: a cheerful boy with light blond hair and a bright smile; the big brother, a head taller than his little sister

name: Valentýnka
description: a small toddler girl with blond hair, often wearing a hair bow; the little sister, noticeably smaller than her big brother

name: Táta Jan
description: a tall, warm-hearted Czech dad with a big friendly smile, always ready for adventure with his kids

name: Máma Jana
description: a kind, nurturing Czech mom with a bright smile and warm eyes, the loving heart of the family
